tools.name: search_devices
tools.description: Search ~8,900 Max for Live devices for Ableton Live. Fuzzy full-text match (title/author/description, identical to max4.live) plus filters. Compose for natural language, e.g. "popular free MIDI devices from the last 2 weeks" -> type=[MIDI Effect,MIDI Generator,MIDI Transformation], license=[free], s

tools.name: get_device
tools.description: Get full details for one device by its numeric id (from search_devices results).

tools.name: list_filters
tools.description: List the valid values for the type, license and sort filters of search_devices.
